_doc: Single source of truth for every periodic puller in the portfolio. Edit and SIGHUP the scheduler to reload (kill -HUP $(cat ~/Documents/scheduler.pid)). Per-job stdout/stderr lands in ~/Documents/scheduler_logs/<name>.log.
_session7_notes: Session 7 (2026-05-16) FINAL sweep: removed t1_nws_actuals (T1 archived session 6), t2_daily_picks (T2 archived 2026-05-09), t3b_nowcast_puller + t3b_bls_actuals + t3c_claims_data (T3b + T3c archived session 7 — macro family pulled). Live T1 weather logger + T5 thesis factory + all T3b/T3c daemons + T3a fed_scanner must be killed on-host (see kill commands in session 7 handoff). Only T6 lines puller and entropy detector remain.

jobs.name: t6_mlb_lines_puller
jobs._notes: T6 sharp Vegas line pull. 90-min cadence. Bankroll $18K (T3b + T3c archive absorption); Kelly cap 5% per bet → max $900 single position; 50% exposure cap → $9K.

jobs.name: entropy_collapse_detector
jobs._notes: Cross-engine informed-flow detector. Reads kalshi snapshot files. After session 7 macro-family archive, the only consumers are T6/T7 — but the detector keeps running because Phase 2 directional entry (after n>=15 calibrated alerts) may still arrive. If it generates noise for archived engines, scope it down to T6/T7 then.
